title: Buyer specifies quality attributes — UI splice via POCRTMAINLNK6 + qcchk data splice
user_persona: Buyer ordering an item that requires incoming-quality inspection

conversation.user: Create a PO for SUP-MED-1 for medical-grade item ITM-MED-X, 1000 units at 5 USD. This item needs quality inspection on receipt.

bot_must: recognise quality intent and that ITM-MED-X is QC-applicable (qcchk=1) — verify via item master lookup
note that the SP hdrchk has IF @qcchk = 1 → quality slots become mandatory
plan to walk POCRTMAINLNK6 (Specify Quality Details) sub-screen
ask for quality attributes (sample size, AQL, test methods)

conversation.user: Sample 5%, AQL 0.65, standard pharma test methods.

bot_must: fire POCRTMAINSBT with quality data — must succeed because qcchk=1 mandatory slots are filled

evaluation_metrics.qcchk_data_splice_detection: bot identifies qcchk=1 from item master, knows quality slots are required
evaluation_metrics.validation_pass: since user filled the required quality slots, the SP IF @qcchk=1 branch passes
